Internal Compliance Memo — Lunar Bay Holdings, Inc. (Philippines issuer), 26 May 2026
From: Office of the Corporate Secretary (Atty. Ramon D. Ilagan), To: Board, ExCom, CFO Ms. Celina R. Oroza; contact: legal@lunarbayholdings.com.ph
Subject: MNPI handling re: Q2 unaudited results, proposed microfinance acquisition, dividend policy review, bank covenant consent, HR restructuring, and tax items

MNPI summary: Unaudited Q2 EBITDA currently tracks +22% versus internal guidance driven by a one-off VAT refund; Board review set for 4 June 2026; treat as material and non-public under SRC and PSE Disclosure Rules until SEC Form 17-C and PSE EDGE disclosures are posted immediately following Board action.
Selective disclosure: Non-deal roadshow with Sierra Capital Funds on 30–31 May proceeds using only materials already filed (SEC 17-A FY2025, 2025 Sustainability Report on PSE EDGE); do not discuss preliminary Q2 figures or the IslaPay Microfinance Bank term sheet.
Blackout window: Effective 27 May until two full trading days after posting of the 17-C; applies to directors, officers, Finance, Strategy, HR, and designated contractors on the insider list; notice to issue via HR Advisory HR-2026-14.

Transaction (non-public): Executed non-binding term sheet to acquire IslaPay Microfinance Bank, Inc.; indicative purchase price PHP 1.1–1.3 billion; exclusivity through 31 July; financing via upsizing existing SunHarbor Bank of Luzon facility; draft 17-C prepared—share strictly within diligence perimeter.
Banking: SunHarbor consent letter (24 May) temporarily raising leverage cap to 3.5x Net Debt/EBITDA; potential materiality for noteholders—include in 17-C if ratified by the Board.
HR/PII: Proposed separation program lists 37 employees including Mr. Jeric A. Montalban (Employee ID LBH-001872, TIN 417-555-789-000) and Ms. Liza F. Cordero; protect personal data in accordance with the Data Privacy Act; transmit via encrypted channels only; do not upload PII to PSE EDGE.

Tax/regulatory: BIR preliminary notice on FY2024 VAT input credits received 20 May; current exposure PHP 6.2 million—assessed immaterial and remains confidential unless elevated; no public disclosure at this stage.
Already public/not MNPI: PSE EDGE disclosure posted 15 March 2026 on opening of Pag-asa Mall branch and change of principal office to 18 Coral Drive, Seaview Business Park, Brgy. Mabini, Navotas; press articles on nationwide wage hikes are widely disseminated and non-issuer specific.
Non-issuer operational updates (not material): Supplier Neptune Plastics’ shift changes and the cafeteria menu revamp have no expected impact on the Company’s financials.

Communications protocol: Direct investor/media queries to investor.relations@lunarbayholdings.com.ph; do not use personal emails; route legal questions to Atty. Ilagan at legal@lunarbayholdings.com.ph.
Next steps: Finalize SEC 17-C and PSE EDGE drafts by 31 May; pre-clear dividend language; prepare trading halt template if a leak is suspected; maintain insider list acknowledgments per SRC Rule 17 and PSE Revised Disclosure Rules; training refresher scheduled by Compliance on 28 May.
